config.name: Catastrophe Resilience: Survival Under Fire
config.hypothesis: Moderate catastrophe rates (0.005-0.01) produce more resilient civilizations than either peaceful (0.0) or apocalyptic (0.03) conditions

findings: Peak mean survival (500.0 epochs) at catastrophe_base_prob = 0.0000
Collapse rate: 0% at peaceful (0.0) vs 0% at extreme (0.03)
Mid-range catastrophe (0.0150) produces mean pop 47.9 vs 49.6 at peaceful
Mean catastrophe deaths at extreme rate: 12.1
